# Akr Node Module & Skill Platform

Akr is a premium developer tool and module ecosystem for Node.js. It provides high-performance templates and AI-powered workflow skills to scaffold, build, and deploy production-ready applications with cinematic visual aesthetics and top-tier performance.

## Key Features
- High performance Node.js templates
- AI workflow skills for design perfection
- Seamless deployment processes

## Documentation
Documentation can be found on our main site under the /#docs route.
